name: API route file exposes ALL imports, declarations, and member calls — not just spot facts

gate.description: Stricter than the existing rallly.ast.api-route gate: every external import in the file must be extracted, the route variable must show as both an exported declaration and an export fact, and the chain of app.post and createPoll calls must both carry containingDeclarationName='polls' so fusion can attribute callers correctly.

name: Mutation file preserves the full prisma.poll.create member chain receiver and propertyName

gate.description: `prisma.poll.create(...)` must produce a member call fact whose receiver is `prisma.poll`, propertyName is `create`, and containingDeclarationName is `createPoll`. This is what lets the graph build a precise CALLS edge from createPoll to the database client member.

name: Database client file emits BOTH the named export and the default re-export with localName=prisma

gate.description: Many real Prisma client files expose the client as both a named export and a default export. The extractor must produce both export facts AND retain localName='prisma' on the default export so the graph can canonicalise them onto the same symbol.

name: Private API route test extracts vi.mock targets with module specifier metadata

gate.description: `vi.mock('./route', ...)` (and any other mock target) must produce a call fact whose memberPath is 'vi.mock'. This is the AST signal test-linking needs to create mock-derived TESTS edges.

name: Middleware async handler is extracted as a VariableFunction declaration with exported=true

gate.description: Async handler functions assigned to top-level const must be extracted as VariableFunction declarations, not just Variable declarations. The exported flag must propagate from the export statement.

name: UI loader records dynamic import with specifier './admin-page' and importKind='dynamic'

gate.description: next/dynamic-style code-splitting boundaries depend on the indexer treating `import('./admin-page')` as a dynamic import fact with exact specifier preserved. JSX `<AdminPage />` invocations must also carry containingDeclarationName='AdminPageLoader'.
